title: Louvain-la-Neuve、Walloon Brabant — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Louvain-la-Neuve、Walloon Brabantの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Louvain-la-NeuveはWalloon Brabantにある人口30,000の都市です。A purpose-built university town created in the 1970s, home to the French-speaking Catholic University of Louvain with a lively student atmosphere.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
